name: Hermes Desktop
notes: Ad-hoc signed, no hardened runtime, Electron fuses open — the generic CDP adapter injects cleanly.
RTL is applied at runtime through Chromium remote debugging; nothing on disk is copied, patched, or re-signed.
Debug port stays open for the session (127.0.0.1, random port). Payload is Claude-tuned, so Hermes coverage is broad but polish is ongoing.
